# `nise sync python`

- **Usage**: `nise sync python [--pyenv] [--uv]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/sync/python.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/sync/python.rs)

Symlinks all tool versions from an external tool into nise

For example, use this to import all pyenv installs into nise

This won't overwrite any existing installs but will overwrite any existing symlinks

## Flags

### `--pyenv`

Get tool versions from pyenv

### `--uv`

Sync tool versions with uv (2-way sync)

Examples:

```
$ pyenv install 3.11.0
$ nise sync python --pyenv
$ nise use -g python@3.11.0 - uses pyenv-provided python

$ uv python install 3.11.0
$ nise install python@3.10.0
$ nise sync python --uv
$ nise x python@3.11.0 -- python -V - uses uv-provided python
$ uv run -p 3.10.0 -- python -V - uses nise-provided python
```
